Applying to 00110000
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 AND 61 = AND(I 6,I 1) = AND(0,0) = 0
1 MAJ 720 = MAJ(I 7,I 2,I 0) = MAJ(0,1,0) = 0
2 MAJ 031 = MAJ(I 0,I 3,I 1) = MAJ(0,1,0) = 0
3 MAJ 142 = MAJ(I 1,I 4,I 2) = MAJ(0,0,1) = 0
4 MAJ 253 = MAJ(I 2,I 5,I 3) = MAJ(1,0,1) = 1
5 MAJ 364 = MAJ(I 3,I 6,I 4) = MAJ(1,0,0) = 0
6 MAJ 475 = MAJ(I 4,I 7,I 5) = MAJ(0,0,0) = 0
7 AND 56 = AND(I 5,I 6) = AND(0,0) = 0

\boxed{00001000}
